about.title: About Me
about.details: Here are some technologies that I have been working with recently:

service-section.title: Services
service-section.description: Services I offer to my clients
service-section.responsive-info: Your site will display properly on any device, including desktop computers, tablets and mobile phones.
service-section.prototype-info: A good prototyping of the web design allows to visualize the client how your website will look before implementing it.
service-section.creative-info: A good and attractive web design helps you keep your leads on your site, which is the digital face of your business.
service-section.development-info: I know the importance of web design and can help you create a website you’ll love.

contact-section.title: Contact Me
contact-section.description: If you have a job offer, a project proposal or are interested in that we work together contact me.
